name: Bright Sikazwe Academic CV
value_statement: Cuts CV sharing latency from hours to instant for recruiters and academic partners — demonstrating interactive portfolio items.
description: An interactive digital curriculum vitae showcasing the academic publications and software products of Bright Sikazwe.

capabilities.summary: An interactive digital curriculum vitae showcasing the academic publications and software products of Bright Sikazwe.

skills_posture.meta_skill_governance: agent-authored skills enter at DRAFT tier; PR-reviewed; added to eval set before promotion

security_posture.sandbox: kernel-isolated, network-isolated, state-resetting for generated code
security_posture.access_model: Zero Ambient Authority + JIT short-lived task-scoped tokens; deny-by-default file-tree allowlist
security_posture.tool_authorisation: centralised gateway + contextual authorisation + runtime guard
security_posture.observability: span-based tracing; AgBOM + Agent Trust Score; version checkpoints + circuit breaker; Denial-of-Wallet guard
security_posture.audit: immutable per-action trail (agent identity + approving human)

evaluation.safety_rai: transversal (vulns, secret/IP leak, refusal, content safety)
